response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 20 years of broad engineering experience and demonstrates genuine entrepreneurial instincts through GISCollective and open-source contributions, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership that his profile does not yet support. His AI exposure is nascent — limited to MCP tooling work begun in April 2025 — with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale. There is no evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive-level technical influence, or the recognized AI expertise the position explicitly requires. His background is that of a strong hands-on staff engineer, not a director-level IC shaping cloud and AI strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial track record via founding GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform with real-world NGO adoption
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks, workshops, and community involvement signals communication and teaching ability
concerns: AI expertise is very recent and shallow — MCP tooling work dates only to April 2025, with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or published research
No evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advisory, no cross-org influence, no record of shaping product or platform direction at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and only surface-level cloud experience (a single AWS CDK mention), both of which are preferred qualifications for this role

key_factors.factor: No director-level or strategic advisory experience
